series_metadata.series_description: This record series contains documents and forms related to the application and subsequent approval/disapproval to operate a nurse aide training program. Documentation includes, but is not limited to; the application, couse agenda/criteria, trainer qualifications, approval/disapproval letters, class schedule, trainee report, revocation and other ''enforcement'' letters and general correspondence.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Active Programs: records five years year in which record was prepared. five year period provided that no legal action is pending against facility and all appeals have been resolved. Inactive or Closed Programs: records two additional years following year in which final action was taken with respect denial, termination, or withdrawal. record this two year period provided that no legal action is pending against facility and all appeals have been resolved ; Electronic: Same retention period as paper
